examples.name: Makima
examples.passive: Void chains bind enemies, lowering accuracy, delaying ultimate gain, and briefly silencing skills.
examples.lore: A corrupted alternate Makima empowered by the Void. She commands unseen chains that twist will into obedience.

examples.name: Aizen
examples.revealQuote: Your senses belong to the Void.
examples.passive: Enemies have reduced effect resistance and may fail to target correctly when under Void Bind.

examples.name: Gojo
examples.revealQuote: Infinity has collapsed into the Void.
examples.passive: Dodges the first lethal hit and converts part of avoided damage into Void damage.

examples.name: Madara
examples.passive: Deals bonus Shadow damage and gains energy when enemies are debuffed.

variantNamingRules: Variants are separate character entries, not skins.
Examples: Corrupted Makima, Awakened Gojo, Fallen Aizen, Eclipse Madara, Voidborn Rimuru, True Form Sukuna.
Variant has its own rarity, passive, lore, quote, reveal, and power.
